headline: D.R. Horton Vs. Lennar: Homebuilder Showdown As Mortgage Rates Jump
summary: D.R. Horton outshines Lennar through an asset-light model and superior efficiency that thrives during inflation-driven cycles. Read more on DHI and LEN stocks here.
